profile_backed_target.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-profile-p1vbf50 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(eig_48x48_f64|eigh_48x48_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|pinv_256x128_f64|pinv_192x192_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|svd_48x48_f64|svd_48x48_full_f64|matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64|matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64)' --quick --noplot
profile_backed_target.selection_note: After GEMM KC512 failed the keep gate, pinv_256x128_f64 was the top non-GEMM fj-lax linalg row with profile evidence on the same RCH worker.

lever.summary: Use portable SIMD for the contiguous W and V column rotation loops inside one_sided_jacobi_svd_real.
lever.alien_primitive: portable SIMD lane grouping for numerical linear-algebra rotation kernels
lever.decision: Rejected because the measured same-worker win did not clear Score >= 2.0.

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-glfd9-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_256x128_f64 --quick --noplot

candidate.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-glfd9-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_256x128_f64 --quick --noplot

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: The Jacobi pair order p,q, convergence checks, dot products, norm reductions, and singular-value sorting still run in the same order. The SIMD candidate only grouped independent per-row W/V rotation updates after c and s were already computed.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: Singular-value ordering and total_cmp tie behavior were unchanged; the candidate introduced no new pivot or sort key.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Schur coefficient formulas and all dot/norm reductions were unchanged. The W/V rotation update for each element used the same multiply/sub/add expressions; lane grouping changed scheduling only for independent elements in private contiguous buffers.
isomorphism_proof.error_surface: pinv shape, dtype, rcond cutoff, empty-matrix, and fallback behavior were unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.nan_surface: NaN propagation followed the same Jacobi pair traversal and scalar formulas.

validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-glfd9-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib pinv -- --nocapture

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-glfd9-svd-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib one_sided_jacobi_svd_real -- --nocapture

fallback: No runtime fallback is needed because no source lever was shipped. The recorded candidate should not be retried as a micro-lever unless a future profile shows the rotation loops dominate under a different implementation.
next_profile_note: A rejected micro-lever on Jacobi rotations routes the next pass toward an algorithmically different primitive: blocked/parallel Jacobi pair scheduling, communication-avoiding SVD/QR assembly, or a different top linalg row proven by the next RCH profile.
